modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Error message prevents editing D2L worksheet on Mac.

full_description_text: 
User downloaded a worksheet from D2L.  
Upon opening, an error message appeared stating "View Only."  
The message indicates that the account Firstnme.Lastname@coyote.usd.edu lacks editing permissions on a Mac.  
User is advised to contact the admin regarding the Microsoft 365 plan for further assistance.
